chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ لِوَلَدِهِ الْجَارِيَةُ يُرِيدُ أَنْ يَطَأَهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 112 – The man whose son happens to have a slave girl, so he intends to sleep with her

text: كَتَبْتُ إِلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي جَارِيَةٍ لِابْنٍ لِي صَغِيرٍ أَ يَجُوزُ لِي أَنْ أَطَأَهَا فَكَتَبَ لَا حَتَّى تُخَلِّصَهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail who said,
‘I wrote to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> regarding a slave girl of a young son of mine, it is allowed for me that I sleep with her?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> wrote: ‘No, until you free her’.
